creator: admin@5034.ru
text:
Hi All,

FreeBSD version:
FreeBSD server.5034.ru 12.0-STABLE FreeBSD 12.0-STABLE #2 r343904M:

Kernel panic after disconnect pptp client (client was connected via mpd5):
